birth, he should get a gain with a female; the 2nd house to
Mesha (Aries) becomes the house ofKutumba/family.
In this world, only Saturn (Sani) is considered for
profession and is knwon as lord of profession. for whatever
good or bad deeds done by the native, the gain/loss is
accumulated at the houses 10 and II during the time of king
Vikramaaditya, Saturn (Sani) has solemnly afftrmed that he will
not harm any one. Whatever the god promised will not be
broken. It is not good to vilify saying 8th Saturn, 9 Saturn or
Saturn in ascendant/ birth Saturn (Sani) etc. But the question
arises who is undergoing the troubles? For Example, if the native
has lost the profession it is due to arrogancy/egoism,
disinterestedness, fickleness/unsteady mind.
Saturn (Sani) will act as postman who carries the letters
I matters. Happiness and hardship or any adverse actions in life
would be according to the native's deeds. Mind, Egoism and
